title: 10mm Brass Compression Stop End – Pack of 2 | Easy Fit Blank Cap for Copper Pipe | No Soldering Required
features: Pack of 2: Two brass stop ends for 10mm copper pipes.
Compression Fitting: Simple installation—no heat or soldering required.
Durable Brass: Strong, corrosion-resistant material for long-lasting use.
Leak-Free Seal: Provides a secure end cap for pipework.
Versatile Use: Ideal for DIY repairs, plumbing, and heating systems.
description: This Pack of 2 Brass Compression Stop Ends is ideal for sealing 10mm copper pipework in plumbing and heating systems. Built from solid brass, these caps offer a secure and leak-free seal without the need for soldering—just tighten with a spanner.
